title: MATANA - 200 Wooden Knives - Disposable Wooden Knives for BBQ's, Picnics & More - Knife Set for Outdoor Dining - Alternative to Plastic Cutlery - 16cm
features: 🌿 ECO-FRIENDLY & SUSTAINABLE - Made with a commitment to our planet, our wooden knife cutlery set is 100% compostable, perfect for the eco-conscious consumer.
🌿 SUPERIOR QUALITY - Crafted from 100% fir wood, our knives are not only robust and durable but also meet strict quality and safety standards. Perfect alongside wooden spoons & wooden forks.
🌿VERSATILE - Ideal for a range of occasions - from outdoor BBQs and picnics to garden parties and summer events. Enjoy your events while making an eco-friendly choice.
🌿 BULK PACK - With a generous pack of 200 units, be well-equipped for any gathering or party, ensuring you have enough knives without sacrificing style or convenience.
🌿 A HEALTHY CHOICE - Opt for our wooden knives to make a positive environmental impact. Made from natural, compostable materials, it's a choice that blends culinary needs with the environment.
